sqlMap.select: select * from RevenueFromITServices where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into RevenueFromITServices(ITServiceKey, ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey) values (#ITServiceKey:NUMERIC#, #ITServiceCategoryKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# )
sqlMap.select: select ITServiceKey, ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RevenueFromITServices where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update RevenueFromITServices set
where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from RevenueFromITServices where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from RevenueFromITServices where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
sqlMap.select: select ITServiceKey, ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RevenueFromITServices where ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ITServiceKey, ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RevenueFromITServices where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ITServiceKey = #ITServiceKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
